label: Continual learning & test-time adaptation pipelines

node.label: Continual learning & test-time adaptation pipelines
node.definition: Continual and test-time adaptation update a model, memory, statistics, or prompts as distributions and tasks change after the initial training run.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Continual learning & test-time adaptation pipelines is to connect Continual & online learning, In-context & test-time learning to downstream capabilities including Knowledge editing & memory consolidation.
examples: substrate for Knowledge editing & memory consolidation
limitations: Results are sensitive to data quality, hyperparameters, compute budget, random variation, and evaluation contamination. Its direct dependencies include Continual & online learning, In-context & test-time learning.

dependencies.rationale: Continual learning & test-time adaptation pipelines uses Continual & online learning as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Continual learning & test-time adaptation pipelines uses In-context & test-time learning as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Continual learning & test-time adaptation pipelines uses Supervised fine-tuning & instruction tuning as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.

sentence_units.text: Continual and test-time adaptation update a model, memory, statistics, or prompts as distributions and tasks change after the initial training run.
